name: Backup workflow configs to Google Drive
description: Exports workflow configurations and settings as a JSON backup file, uploads it to a designated Google Drive folder, and posts a backup confirmation to Slack.

source.originalName: Backup n8n workflows to Google Drive

driveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for uploading backup files

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting backup confirmation

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for backup notifications

backupFolderId.description: Google Drive folder ID where backups should be stored

backupData.description: JSON string of workflow configurations to backup

steps.name: Prepare backup file content with metadata
Upload backup file to Google Drive
